title: stachys bulgarica
intro: Stachys bulgarica, also known as Bulgarian betony, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family, Lamiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. Bulgarian betony has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, thanks to its adaptogenic and sedative properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular remedy in folk medicine.
